testcase.name: test_rating_flow

failure.message: AssertionError: SPEC deviation: self-rating expected 400, got 201 assert 201 == 400 + where 201 = <Response [201]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_leave_as_admin_behavior

skipped.message: Skipping destructive admin-leave test to preserve seed data. Current server does NOT block admin leave nor transfer admin — issue for main agent.
